title: SAKE Modpack
description: Modpack for playing on Sakeva Server
body:
# **SAKE Modpack**
[![Based on my main modpack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd6f9b5a88b37170a2db00e8c091ccdd3f32444a.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nicklyoptimized)

---

## **Key Features:**

**1. All OptiFine Features, there are some of main of them:**
- **Zoom** (Ok Zoomer)
- **Dynamic Lighting** (LambDynamicLights)
- **Shaders** (Iris Shaders)
- **Connected Glass** and resource pack support for glowing textures (Continuity)

**2. Optimization**
Improved performance for smooth gameplay.

**3. Social Mods:**
- **PlasmoVoice** — voice chat
- **Emotecraft** — emotes
- **PatPat**

---

## **Utilities:**
| Mod                     | Description                                                                 |
|-------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **Crash Assistant**     | Log window with instructions for fixing errors                            |
| **Gamma Utils**         | Client-side night vision/brightness (hotkeys **G/H**)                      |
| **Litematica (+ Printer)** | Hologram schematics (keybind **M**)                                      |
| **Freecam (Fair Play)** | Free camera mode (keybind **F4**)                                          |
| **Longer Chat History** | Chat history up to **64k messages**                                       |
| **Shulker Box Tooltip** | View shulker box contents on hover                                        |
| **Bobby**               | Increased chunk loading                                                   |
| **Client Sort**         | Inventory sorting                                                         |
| **Xaero’s Map Mods**    | Enhanced navigation                                                       |

---

## **Visuals & Quality of Life:**
| Mod                     | Description                                                                 |
|-------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **AppleSkin**           | Food stats in **HUD**                                                      |
| **Chat Heads**          | Player heads in chat                                                       |
| **Better Tab**          | Ping, heads, unlimited tab list                                            |
| **PACF**                | Expanded achievements screen                                               |
| **Resourcify**          | Download resource packs/shaders from **CurseForge/Modrinth**              |
| **Cubes Without Borders** | Fullscreen mode with quick **Alt+Tab**                                    |
| **Smooth Scrolling**    | Smooth scrolling                                                           |
| **Status Effect Timer** | Effect timers                                                              |
| **ClickThrough Plus**   | Open inventories/interfaces through signs/frames                           |
